description: A fully self-hosted DevOps platform running on a VPS, centred around a custom container management dashboard, with Gitea for source control and CI/CD, Traefik for reverse proxy and SSL, and a full security gauntlet pipeline.

stack.language: TypeScript (Node.js) for dashboard backend; React for dashboard frontend

dashboard.description: Custom web UI — the centrepiece of the platform
features: List all containers with running/stopped/errored status
Start, stop, restart controls per container
CPU and memory usage per container
dashboard.access: Served by Traefik via subdomain (e.g. dashboard.yourdomain.com)
dashboard.auth: Basic auth or simple login page
dashboard.docker_socket: Read + control access to Docker socket

qa.description: Spun up on PR open, torn down after merge to main

prod.description: Persistent — Traefik routes live traffic — manual approval gate

deployment_model: Build once in dev (image digest), promote same image to QA, then prod (no rebuild)

gauntlet.T1: Unit + integration tests (>=80% coverage) — hard block on failure
gauntlet.T2: SAST via Semgrep — CRITICAL/HIGH = hard block
gauntlet.T3: IaC scan via Trivy on Compose files + Dockerfiles — HIGH = hard block
gauntlet.T4: DAST via OWASP ZAP against live QA slot (HIGH/CRIT = hard block) + k6 p99 < 500ms
gauntlet.T5: Policy gate — Trivy CVE scan + Gitleaks secrets scan

security_rules: Agents never handle, request, store, or transmit credentials
Credential detected in context → CREDENTIAL_LEAKED (full halt)
Secrets via Gitea Actions secret store only
3 gauntlet failures on same story → NEEDS_HUMAN state
agent_rules: Agents never touch main directly — always PRs
All 5 gauntlet gates required — no skipping without human waiver
